title: campylospermum plicatum
intro: Campylospermum plicatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the folded leaf wood violet. The medicinal properties of Campylospermum plicatum lie in its roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. This plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Campylospermum plicatum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion of its roots, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for skin and wound care.
